steps.title: Match the punctuation pair
steps.content: The phrase defining stratigraphy is supplementary: the analysis of Earth's sediment layers (strata). Because a dash already appears after (strata), the punctuation before the definition must be a matching dash.

steps.title: Eliminate mismatched marks
steps.content: B opens with a parenthesis but closes with a dash. C opens with a colon, and D opens with a comma; neither can pair with the later dash to frame the definition. Only a dash before the definition creates the correct matching pair. The answer is A.
